cameras.description: Entry/exit glass door threshold — camera mounted high-left inside store looking toward glass door
Main floor skincare section — overhead camera covers The Face Shop / Good Vibes / Derma product wall
Main floor makeup section — wide-angle covering Lakme / FacesCanada / Maybelline / Swiss Beauty
Billing counter / POS terminal area — laptop and cash register visible
Stockroom / back office — staff-only zone with Purplle inventory boxes
